lesson.menu_desc: Let me explain & The reason is -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 17 -- Responding to Questions -- Q&A Skills
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Karina Macedo | Aula 17 -- Responding to Questions: Q&A Skills

listenings.text: Good morning, Robert. You have some questions about the deal, and I am happy to answer them. Let me explain the price first. The reason is the new engine. It is faster and safer, so the price is fair. For example, you save money on fuel every month. You asked about the discount too. Let me clarify: the discount is five percent this month. I suppose you want a clear answer, so let me repeat the main points. Does that answer your question?

Hello, this is Robert. Thank you for the proposal. I have a few questions, and I want to be sure I understand. First, can you explain the price again? The reason I ask is my budget. Second, can you clarify the discount? I want an exact number. For instance, is it five or ten percent? Certainly, the aircraft is great. I just want you to repeat the main terms, so everything is clear. Please call me back. Thank you.

extra_audio.text: First, Robert asked a question about the price. Then Karina said let me explain. Next, she gave the reason and an example. After that, she repeated the main terms to clarify. Finally, she asked does that answer your question, and Robert said yes.
